description_long: This object is a detailed representation of a lobster, featuring a segmented body with a robust cephalothorax and a curled abdomen. The lobster's two large, asymmetrical claws are prominently displayed, with one noticeably larger than the other, and both are textured to suggest a hard exoskeleton. The walking legs are slender and jointed, extending from beneath the body, while the tail fans out at the rear, showing distinct segmentation. The surface coloration is a mix of pale beige and brown, with subtle shading that mimics the natural appearance of a lobster shell. The object is displayed on a flat, dark base, which contrasts with the lighter tones of the lobster. No antennae or eyes are clearly visible in the images, focusing attention on the claws and body structure.
description: A realistic lobster with large claws, segmented body, and jointed legs, colored in pale beige and brown tones on a dark base.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the lobster, highlighting the large claws and segmented tail.
description_view_1: Angled front view emphasizing the size and shape of the claws, with the body receding into the background.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the lobster's body curve and the arrangement of the legs and tail.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the fan-shaped tail and the symmetrical arrangement of the walking legs.
